verdict.reason: New behavioral commitment: the claim defines an infrastructure adapter that runs the Codex planner as a subprocess and implements PlannerPort, but AC-10 only commits to `cargo make ci` passing after migration, role/lint/catalogue/matrix work is complete; it does not motivate or require this adapter behavior.

New behavioral commitment: the claim defines an infrastructure adapter that runs the Codex planner subprocess and handles stdout/stderr logging, while AC-06 only requires CLI layer type catalogues and allowlisted role declarations plus `cargo make ci` passing; the evidence does not motivate this adapter responsibility.

verdict.citation: `libs/infrastructure` が `CodexPlannerAdapter`（SecondaryAdapter）として `PlannerPort` を実装し、サブプロセス起動・stderr tee・ログファイル書き込みの全 I/O を担う。
(3) `libs/infrastructure/src/codex_planner.rs` が `PlannerPort` を実装する `CodexPlannerAdapter` を定義し、サブプロセス起動・stderr tee・ログファイル書き込みロジックを内包する。
